speaker: speaker1
text: Professor Li , do you know where to buy art supplies ?

speaker: speaker2
text: For what ? Are you taking up painting ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No . I can't paint . I'm asking for my niece . She is really into it .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , good . How old is your niece ?

speaker: speaker1
text: She is eight . Actually , I'm buying a good set of art supplies for her as a birthday gift .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's a wise thing to do . Art will do a child a world of good .
